DOWNFALL-REPLICATE.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold], add a copy to your discard pile.
DOWNFALL-STRIKE_AUTOMATON.title: Strike
DOWNFALL-BIT_SHIFT.title: Bit Shift
DOWNFALL-BIT_SHIFT.description: Choose an Encoded card to return to your hand. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold].
DOWNFALL-BRANCH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage or gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. The option not chosen is [gold]Encoded[/gold].
DOWNFALL-BRANCH.title: Branch
DOWNFALL-BRANCH_BLOCK.title: Branch: Block
DOWNFALL-BRANCH_ATTACK.title: Branch: Attack
DOWNFALL-BUG_BARRAGE.description: Gain 2 [gold]Wounds[/gold]. [gold]Cycle[/gold] each [gold]status[/gold], dealing {Damage:diff()} damage for each.
DOWNFALL-BUG_BARRAGE.title: Bug Barrage
DOWNFALL-BUGGY_MESS.title: Buggy Mess
DOWNFALL-CLEANSE.title: Cleanse
DOWNFALL-CLEANSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random [gold]Status[/gold] card in your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-CUT_THROUGH.title: Cut Through
DOWNFALL-DELAYED_GUARD.title: Delayed Guard
DOWNFALL-DEPRECATE.title: Deprecate
DOWNFALL-FINE_TUNING.title: Fine Tuning
DOWNFALL-FINE_TUNING.description: Increase all numbers of Encoded cards by 1 except cost.
DOWNFALL-FRONTLOAD.title: Frontload
DOWNFALL-INVALIDATE.title: Invalidate
DOWNFALL-OIL_SPILL.title: Oil Spill
DOWNFALL-OVERHEAT.title: Overheat
DOWNFALL-OVERHEAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove the next [gold]Compile Error[/gold] you would [gold]Encode[/gold].
DOWNFALL-PIERCING_SHOT.title: Piercing Shot
DOWNFALL-ROBO_CHOP.title: Robo-Chop
DOWNFALL-ROBO_CHOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} additional {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:plural:card|cards}.
DOWNFALL-SAFEGUARD.title: Safeguard
DOWNFALL-STICKY_SHIELD.title: Sticky Shield
DOWNFALL-TURBO.title: Turbo
DOWNFALL-TURBO.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into you discard pile.
DOWNFALL-WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
DOWNFALL-ALLOCATE.title: Allocate
DOWNFALL-ALLOCATE.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Status[/gold] in your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-BACKTRACE.title: Backtrace
DOWNFALL-BLOCKCHAIN.title: Blockchain
DOWNFALL-BOOST.title: Boost
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_ARMOR.title: Bronze Armor
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_ORB.title: Bronze Orb
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_ORB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Encode[/gold] a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold] in you draw pile.
DOWNFALL-CLASS_DEFAULT.title: Class Default
DOWNFALL-CLASS_DEFAULT.description: Next 2 times you create a Function, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of  current card in the first slot.
DOWNFALL-CLEAN_CODE.title: Clean Code
DOWNFALL-CLEAN_CODE.description: Remove the next 3 [gold]Compile Errors[/gold] you would [gold]Encode[/gold].
DOWNFALL-CONSTRUCTOR.title: Constructor
DOWNFALL-CONSTRUCTOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] as the first card, increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {ExtraBlock:diff()}.
DOWNFALL-COPY_PASTE.title: Copy Paste
DOWNFALL-COPY_PASTE.description: Play a copy of each Encoded card. They do not Encode.
DOWNFALL-DIGITAL_CARNAGE.title: Digital Carnage
DOWNFALL-FLAIL.title: Flail
DOWNFALL-FLAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to All enemies 2 times.
Gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FOLLOW_THROUGH.title: Follow Through
DOWNFALL-FOLLOW_THROUGH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last played card was a Function, play this again.
DOWNFALL-FOR_LOOP.title: For Loop
DOWNFALL-FOR_LOOP.description: The next card you [gold]Encode[/gold] causes {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} additional copies to also be [gold]Encoded[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FORCE_SHIELD.title: Force Shield
DOWNFALL-FORCE_SHIELD.description:
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Function created this combat.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FORTIFY.title: Fortify
DOWNFALL-FRAGMENT.title: Fragment
DOWNFALL-GET_LATEST.title: Get Latest
DOWNFALL-GET_LATEST.description: Gain a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold], it costs 0 until played
DOWNFALL-MINOR_BEAM.title: Minor Beam
DOWNFALL-INFINITE_BEAMS.title: Infinite Beams
DOWNFALL-INFINITE_BEAMS.description: At the start of each turn, gain a [gold]Minor Beam{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold].
DOWNFALL-MERGE_POWER.title: Minor Beam
DOWNFALL-MERGE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain X Minor Beams.
DOWNFALL-MERGE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} Minor {Amount:plural:Beam|Beams}.
DOWNFALL-INFINITE_LOOP.title: Infinite Loop
DOWNFALL-ITS_A_FEATURE.title: It's a Feature
DOWNFALL-ITS_A_FEATURE.description: Whenever you draw or Exhaust a Status card, gain {ItsAFeaturePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-ITERATE.title: Iterate
DOWNFALL-MAX_OUTPUT.title: Max Output
DOWNFALL-MAX_OUTPUT.description:
Draw 3 cards.
At the start of each turn, draw 1 additional card and [gold]Insert[/gold] 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold]
DOWNFALL-MERGE_CONFLICT.title: Merge Conflict
DOWNFALL-MERGE_CONFLICT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you [gold]Encode[/gold] a card, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of it.
DOWNFALL-NULL_POINTER.title: Null Pointer
DOWNFALL-OPTIMIZE.title: Optimize
DOWNFALL-OPTIMIZE.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] the next {OptimizePower:diff()} cards you [gold]Encode[/gold] that can be [gold]upgraded[/gold].
DOWNFALL-PHILOSOPHIZE.title: Philosophize
DOWNFALL-RECURSIVE_STRIKE.title: Recursive Strike
DOWNFALL-REFACTOR.title: Refactor
DOWNFALL-REFACTOR.description:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {Scry:diff()}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Status[/gold] cards discarded.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Status[/gold] card [gold]exhausted.[/gold]
DOWNFALL-REPAIR.title: Repair
DOWNFALL-REPULSOR.title: Repulsor
DOWNFALL-REPULSOR.description: When you draw the first [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold] card each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw a card.
DOWNFALL-RETURN.title: Return
DOWNFALL-RETURN.description:
Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
DOWNFALL-SEPARATOR.title: Separator
DOWNFALL-SEPARATOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] in the middle, increase its damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
DOWNFALL-TERMINATOR.title: Terminator
DOWNFALL-FULL_RELEASE.title: Full Release
DOWNFALL-FUNCTION_POWER.title: Full Release
DOWNFALL-UNDERVOLT.title: Undervolt
DOWNFALL-ASSEMBLY.title: Assembly
DOWNFALL-BREAK.title: Break
DOWNFALL-BURN_OUT.title: Burn Out
DOWNFALL-BURN_OUT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for ALL of your [gold]Status[/gold] cards, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them,
DOWNFALL-CULTIST_STRIKE.title: Cultist Strike
DOWNFALL-BYTE_SHIFT.title: Byte Shift
DOWNFALL-BYTE_SHIFT.description:
Return all Encoded cards to your hand.
They gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
DOWNFALL-BATCH.title: Batch
DOWNFALL-BATCH.description: Create a Function immediately out of the cards currently Encoded.
DOWNFALL-DEBUG.title: Debug
DOWNFALL-DEBUG.description: Remove all [gold]Compile Error[/gold] effects from Encoded cards.
DOWNFALL-DEV_TOOLS.title: Dev Tools
DOWNFALL-DECOMPILE.title: Decompile
DOWNFALL-DECOMPILE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Encoded cards.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FIND_AND_REPLACE.title: Find and [gold]Replace[/gold]
DOWNFALL-FIND_AND_REPLACE.description:
[gold]Fetch[/gold] a card from you draw or discard pile.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] where it was.
DOWNFALL-FORMAT.title: Format
DOWNFALL-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.title: HYPER BEAM
DOWNFALL-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Put 5 [gold]Voids[/gold] on top of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-LIBRARY.title: Library
DOWNFALL-LIBRARY.description: At the start of your turn, gain a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold], it costs 0 until played.
DOWNFALL-MUTATOR.title: Mutator
DOWNFALL-MUTATOR.description:
Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] a [gold]Status[/gold] into a copy of this.
DOWNFALL-SENTIENT_FORM.title: Sentient Form
DOWNFALL-SENTIENT_FORM.description: Whenever you draw a Function, increase all numbers on it by 1 except for cost.
DOWNFALL-SHIP_IT.title: Ship It
DOWNFALL-SHIP_IT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Repeat for every [gold]Status[/gold] card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold].
DOWNFALL-SPAGHETTI_CODE.title: Spaghetti Code
DOWNFALL-SPAGHETTI_CODE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 random cards to [gold]Encode[/gold].
Repeat until you create a Function.
DOWNFALL-SUMMON_ORB.title: Summon Orb
DOWNFALL-SUMMON_ORB.description: Whenever you create or play a Function, gain {SummonOrbPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {SummonOrbPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
DOWNFALL-THUNDER_WAVE.title: Thunder Wave
DOWNFALL-THUNDER_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold].
DOWNFALL-VIRUS.title: Virus
DOWNFALL-VIRUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your hand and gain a [gold]Minor Beam[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+|} for each card discarded.
DOWNFALL-DEFEND_AWAKENED.title: Defend
DOWNFALL-STRIKE_AWAKENED.title: Strike
DOWNFALL-TALON_RAKE.title: Talon Rake
DOWNFALL-CEREMONY.title: Ceremony
DOWNFALL-HYMN.title: Hymn
DOWNFALL-HYMN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain a [gold]Ceremony[/gold].
Next turn, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-BURNING_STUDY.title: Burning Study
DOWNFALL-CRYOSTASIS.title: Cryostasis
DOWNFALL-DARKLEECH.title: Darkleech
DOWNFALL-E_S_P.title: ESP
DOWNFALL-THUNDERBOLT.title: Thunderbolt
DOWNFALL-BRAINSHOCK.title: Brainshock
DOWNFALL-BRAINSHOCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your discard pile.
DOWNFALL-CLARION_CALL.title: Clarion Call
DOWNFALL-CLARION_CALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you are [gold]Drained[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-CLUTCH.title: Clutch
DOWNFALL-DEJECTION.title: Dejection
DOWNFALL-DEJECTION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. If it was a Spell, gain a [gold]Ceremony[/gold].
DOWNFALL-ENVISION.title: Envision
DOWNFALL-ENVISION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Conjure[/gold] and put the Spell on top of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-FEATHER_FLARE.title: Feather Flare
DOWNFALL-FEATHER_FLARE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Chant[/gold]: Next turn, draw 1 additional card.
DOWNFALL-AUTOMATON_CARD_MODEL.title: Feather Flare
DOWNFALL-AUTOMATON_CARD_MODEL.descriptio:
Deal {Damge:diff()} damage.
Chant: Next turn, draw 1 additional card.
DOWNFALL-GATHER.title: Gather
DOWNFALL-GATHER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Chant[/gold]: Put a card from your discard pile in your hand.
DOWNFALL-GATHER.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card from your discard pile to put in your hand.
DOWNFALL-RECITATION.title: Recitation
DOWNFALL-CAW.title: Caw
DOWNFALL-CAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Chant[/gold]: Increase the damage of all [gold]Caw[/gold] cards by {Caw:diff()} this combat.
DOWNFALL-RAVEN_STRIKE.title: Raven Strike
DOWNFALL-RAVEN_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
[gold]Chant[/gold]: Play the top card of your draw pile-
DOWNFALL-SIPHON.title: Siphon
DOWNFALL-SIPHON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Chant[/gold]: Steal 2 Strength this turn.
DOWNFALL-TAKE_FLIGHT.title: Take Flight
DOWNFALL-TAKE_FLIGHT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Chant[/gold]: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next turn.
DOWNFALL-VICTUALS.title: Victuals
DOWNFALL-NIHIL.title: Nihil
DOWNFALL-NIHIL.description:
Apply {ManaburnPower:diff()} [gold]Manaburn[/gold].
[gold]Chant[/gold]: ALL enemies lose HP equal to their [gold]Manaburn[/gold].
DOWNFALL-RISING_CHORUS.title: Rising Chorus
DOWNFALL-RISING_CHORUS.description: The first [gold]Chant[/gold] effect you play each turn is activated twice.
DOWNFALL-GLOOMGUARD.title: Gloomguard
DOWNFALL-GLOOMGUARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Costs 0 if a [gold]Void[/gold] is in hand.
DOWNFALL-INITIATION.title: Initiation
DOWNFALL-PECK.title: Peck
DOWNFALL-PLUCK.title: Pluck
DOWNFALL-PLUCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain a [gold]Plume Jab[/gold].
DOWNFALL-PLANESWALK.title: Planeswalk
DOWNFALL-PLANESWALK.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Shuffle a [gold]Void[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-PLUME_JAB.title: Plume Jab
DOWNFALL-PLUME_JAB.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy twice.
DOWNFALL-PROFANE_STRIKE.title: Profane Strike
DOWNFALL-PROFANE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card in your hand on top of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-PROFANE_STRIKE.selectionScreenP: Select a card in your hand and place it on top of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-PSALM.title: Psalm
DOWNFALL-PSALM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALL-SCOUR.title: Scour
DOWNFALL-SPEW.title: Spew
DOWNFALL-SPEW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} spent on this card counts as being [gold]Drained[/gold].
DOWNFALL-UNLEASH.title: Unleash
DOWNFALL-UNLEASH.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each other card in your hand.
DOWNFALL-MOONLIT_VISION.title: Moonlit Vision
DOWNFALL-MOONLIT_VISION.description: The first time you play a Spell each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-DEMON_GLYPH.title: Demon Glyph
DOWNFALL-DEMON_GLYPH.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
When you [gold]Awaken[/gold] gain {DemonGlyphPower:diff()} more.
DOWNFALL-APHOTIC_FOUNT.title: Aphotic Fount
DOWNFALL-ALTAR.title: Altar
DOWNFALL-BLOOD_RITE.title: Blood Rite
DOWNFALL-BYRDS_EYE.title: Byrd's Eye
DOWNFALL-CARRIONMAKER.title: Carrionmaker
DOWNFALL-CARRIONMAKER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Repeat for each Spell played this turn.
DOWNFALL-CHOSEN_VERSE.title: Chosen Verse
DOWNFALL-CHOSEN_VERSE.description: The next 2 times you play a non-Attack card this turn, draw a card and gain {ChosenVersePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-DARK_ECHO.title: Dark Echo
DOWNFALL-DARK_ECHO.description: At the end of your turn, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies, incresed by [gold]Strength[/gold].
DOWNFALL-DARKNESS_FALLS.title: Darkness Falls
DOWNFALL-DEATHCOIL.title: Deathcoil
DOWNFALL-ENSORCELATE.title: Ensorcelate
DOWNFALL-ENSORCELATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next Power you play costs 0.
DOWNFALL-EVENTIDE.title: Eventide
DOWNFALL-EVENTIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy twice.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] to the top of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-EXTENSION.title: Extension
DOWNFALL-EXTENSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a Power, return this card from the discard pile to your hand.
DOWNFALL-FEATHER_VEIL.title: Feather Veil
DOWNFALL-FEATHER_WHIRL.title: Feather Whirl
DOWNFALL-INSCRIBE.title: Inscribe
DOWNFALL-INSCRIBE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Conjure[/gold].
|}Choose a Spell.
Add 2 copies to the Spellbook for the rest of combat.
DOWNFALL-KNIFES_EDGE.title: Knife's Edge
DOWNFALL-KNIFES_EDGE.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Add 2 [gold]Voids[/gold] into your discard pile.
DOWNFALL-MIDDEN_HEAP.title: Midden Heap
DOWNFALL-MIDDEN_HEAP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put 1 [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold] card from your draw or discard pile into you hand.
DOWNFALL-MIRE_PIT.title: Mire Pit
DOWNFALL-MIRE_PIT.description:
ALL enemies lose {TemporaryStrengthDownPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Next turn, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-MYSTIC_ORDER.title: Mystic Order
DOWNFALL-PRIMACY.title: Primacy
DOWNFALL-PRIMACY.description: The first {PrimacyPower:plural:time|{PrimacyPower:diff()} times} you gain [gold]Strength[/gold] each turn, draw a card.
DOWNFALL-SINGULARITY_SHIELD.title: Singularity Shield
DOWNFALL-SINGULARITY_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-SONG_OF_SORROW.title: Song of Sorrow
DOWNFALL-SONG_OF_SORROW.description: Whenever you create a [gold]Void[/gold], ALL enemies lose {SongOfSorrowPower:diff()} HP.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_STRIKE.title: Soul Strike
DOWNFALL-SOUL_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Power played this turn.
DOWNFALL-SPELLSHIELD.title: Spellshield
DOWNFALL-SPLIT_WIDE.title: Split Wide
DOWNFALL-SPLIT_WIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you attack this enemy, gain {SplitWidePower:diff()} temporary [gold]Strength[/gold].
DOWNFALL-STORM_RULER.title: Storm Ruler
DOWNFALL-THAUMATURGY.title: Thaumaturgy
DOWNFALL-THAUMATURGY.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the start of you next 2 turns, add a [gold]Ceremony[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALL-WAVE_OF_MIASMA.title: Wave of Miasma
DOWNFALL-ARCANE_NESTING.title: Arcane Nesting
DOWNFALL-ARCANE_NESTING.description: Whenever you play a Power while this is in hand, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-ARCHMAGUS.title: Archmagus
DOWNFALL-ARCHMAGUS.description: The first Spell you play each turn is played twice.
DOWNFALL-AWAKENED_FORM.title: Awakened Form
DOWNFALL-BLOODTHIRST.title: Bloodthirst
DOWNFALL-BLOODTHIRST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If Fatal, gain a Power Potion and Exhaust this card.
DOWNFALL-DESPERATE_PRAYER.title: Desperate Prayer
DOWNFALL-ECLIPSE_EMBRACE.title: Eclipse Embrace
DOWNFALL-ECLIPSE_EMBRACE.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Void[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card next turn.
DOWNFALL-FOURTH_DIMENSION.title: 4th Dimension
DOWNFALL-FOURTH_DIMENSION.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Shuffle 3 copies of it into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-INTENSIFY.title: Intensify
DOWNFALL-INTENSIFY.description:
[gold]Conjure[/gold].
This turn, Spells cost 0 and you cannon [gold]Conjure[/gold] again.
DOWNFALL-MANASTORM.title: Manastorm
DOWNFALL-MURDER.title: Murder
DOWNFALL-MURDER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
DOWNFALL-PROCESSION.title: Procession
DOWNFALL-PROCESSION.description: Play a card in your draw pile and shuffle in [gold]Voids[/gold] equal to its cost.
DOWNFALL-PROCESSION.selectionScreenPromp: Select a card in your draw pile and shuffle in Voids equal to its cost.
DOWNFALL-REBIRTH.title: Rebirth
DOWNFALL-REBIRTH.description: When you would die or at the end of combat, remove all debuffs, [gold]Awaken[/gold], and heal {AwakeningPower:diff()} HP instead.
DOWNFALL-SKYWARD.title: Skyward
DOWNFALL-SKYWARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Power played this combat.
DOWNFALL-SLUDGE_BOMB.title: Sludge Bomb
DOWNFALL-SLUDGE_BOMB.description:
Requires and erases and [gold]Exhausted Void[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALL-SPELLBINDER.title: Spellbinder
DOWNFALL-SPELLBINDER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Conjure[/gold].
DOWNFALL-THE_TOWER.title: The Tower
DOWNFALL-THE_TOWER.description:
Deal {CalculationBaseVar:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamageVar:diff()} damage for each card created this combat.
DOWNFALL-ARTIFICE.title: Artifice
DOWNFALL-FROM_WITHIN.title: From Within
DOWNFALL-FROM_WITHIN.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. The next time you play a Colorless card, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-IMMOLATION.title: Immolation
DOWNFALL-IMMOLATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Costs 1 less until played for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} [gold]Drained[/gold] this combat.
DOWNFALL-GREAT_HEX.title: Great Hex
DOWNFALL-GREAT_HEX.description: [gold]Chant[/gold]: Target enemy gains {ManaburnPower:diff()} [gold]Manaburn[/gold] at the end of each of its turns.
DOWNFALL-MAGICIANISM.title: Magicianism
DOWNFALL-MAGICIANISM.description: Whenever you play a Colorless card, gain {MagicianismPower:diff()} Block.
DOWNFALL-TALON_REND.title: Talon Rend
DOWNFALL-REALITY_RIFT.title: Reality Rift
DOWNFALL-REALITY_RIFT.description: Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your draw pile. Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}cards from another dimension to add into your hand.
